allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("c:\\Users\\vivek\\Music\\Phone\\Greyworm\\repo\\dash\\attendiq_db_docs.docx"\); $entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq "document.xml" }; $stream = $entry.Open\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $content = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $content -replace '<[^>]+>','' -replace '\\s+',' ' | Select-Object -First 1)
